lemmas.primary_translation: strike / hit / defeat / pour / cut / move suddenly

definitions.text: brått føre en hånd eller noe en holder (med stor kraft) mot noe eller noen og treffe
definitions.translation: to strike suddenly with great force

definitions.text: dunke eller støte til noe (så det smeller)
definitions.translation: to hit or bump something forcefully, making a sound

definitions.text: hamre, banke
definitions.translation: to hammer, to beat

examples.en: she hit me in the face
he bangs his fist on the table
hit the horse with a whip

definitions.text: ufrivillig støte kraftig mot noe (og få vondt eller bli skadet)
definitions.translation: to involuntarily hit something hard, causing pain or injury

examples.no: hun har falt og slått hodet
examples.en: she has fallen and hit her head

definitions.text: vinne over
definitions.translation: to win over

examples.no: han slo alle konkurrentene i hekkeløpet
examples.en: he beat all the competitors in the hurdles race

definitions.text: påvirke med maktmiddel
definitions.translation: to affect with force

definitions.text: tvinge, presse
definitions.translation: to force, to press

examples.en: they put the enemy to flight

definitions.text: ha kraftig virkning
definitions.translation: to have a strong effect

examples.en: a play that really hits home

definitions.text: brått få til å innse
definitions.translation: to suddenly make someone realize

definitions.text: jamfør slående
definitions.translation: striking

examples.no: det slo meg at dette var noe å satse på
examples.en: it struck me that this was something worth going for

definitions.text: skjære eller kutte gress, korn eller lignende med redskap som ljå, slåmaskin eller gressklipper
definitions.translation: to cut grass or grain with a scythe, mower, or trimmer

examples.en: cut the grass with a scythe

definitions.text: gjøre slaglignende bevegelser som lager smell eller annen lyd
definitions.translation: to make striking movements that produce a bang or other sound

definitions.text: dunke, slamre, brake
definitions.translation: to bang, to slam, to crash

definitions.text: gjøre ett eller flere rykk, sleng eller kast med en kroppsdel
definitions.translation: to make one or more jerks, swings, or kicks with a body part

definitions.text: trykke eller hamre på et apparat eller instrument
definitions.translation: to press or hammer on an appliance or instrument

examples.en: enter 200 kroner on the cash register

definitions.text: lage eller få i stand ved å hamre og banke
definitions.translation: to make or establish by hammering and beating

definitions.text: lage en bestemt form på noe ved å knytte, bende, streke opp eller lignende
definitions.translation: to create a specific shape by tying, bending, or drawing

examples.en: put a curl in the tail

examples.no: jeg slo en sirkel rundt Bergen på kartet
examples.en: I drew a circle around Bergen on the map

definitions.text: binde, legge, slenge eller kaste noe rundt noe
definitions.translation: to tie, wrap, or throw something around something else

examples.no: han slo armene rundt halsen på hesten
examples.en: he threw his arms around the horse's neck

definitions.text: helle væske eller masse med en brå bevegelse
definitions.translation: to pour liquid or mass with a sudden movement

definitions.text: tømme
definitions.translation: to pour out

examples.no: slå en bøtte vann på varmen
examples.en: throw a bucket of water on the fire

definitions.text: bevege noe brått så det kommer i en ny stilling
definitions.translation: to move something suddenly to a new position

definitions.text: styrte, strømme, komme farende (brått og med kraft)
definitions.translation: to rush, stream, or come on suddenly and with force

examples.en: the waves broke over the boat
the rain beats against the window
the flames shot into the air

examples.no: en rar lukt slår mot oss
